title: Constrained Delegation S4U2Proxy Abuse via Rubeus
description: Detects abuse of Kerberos constrained delegation (S4U2self + S4U2proxy) via Rubeus 's4u' to impersonate a privileged user to a target service (often CIFS/HOST/LDAP on a DC). GOAD demonstrates this from accounts trusted for delegation.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*s4u*' and 'Command Line' like '*/impersonateuser*')) or (('Command Line' like '*/msdsspn*' or 'Command Line' like '*/altservice*')))
